---
title: 'FW: Schedule Change | Christmas Miracle'
date: '2020-04-04T06:36:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '6218575677246855052'
blogger_filename: '/2020/04/fw-schedule-change-christmas-miracle.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
---

<div class="WordSection1">  <p class="MsoNormal"><b>Possible Schedule Change:<o:p></o:p></b></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>  <table border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="MsoNormalTable" style="border-collapse: collapse; width: 0px;">  <tbody>  <tr style="height: 15pt;">  <td style="height: 15pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt; width: 0.75in;" width="72"></td>  <td style="border: 1pt solid; height: 15pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt; width: 62pt;" width="83">  <p align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;"><b>Sunday<o:p></o:p></b></p>  </td>  <td style="border: 1pt solid; height: 15pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt; width: 68pt;" width="91">  <p align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;"><b>Monday<o:p></o:p></b></p>  </td>  <td style="border: 1pt solid; height: 15pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt; width: 68pt;" width="91">  <p align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;"><b>Tuesday<o:p></o:p></b></p>  </td>  <td style="border: 1pt solid; height: 15pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt; width: 68pt;" width="91">  <p align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;"><b>Wednesday<o:p></o:p></b></p>  </td>  <td style="border: 1pt solid; height: 15pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt; width: 68pt;" width="91">  <p align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;"><b>Thursday<o:p></o:p></b></p>  </td>  <td style="border: 1pt solid; height: 15pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt; width: 68pt;" width="91">  <p align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;"><b>Friday<o:p></o:p></b></p>  </td>  <td style="border: 1pt solid; height: 15pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt; width: 68pt;" width="91">  <p align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;"><b>Saturday<o:p></o:p></b></p>  </td>  </tr>  <tr style="height: 30pt;">  <td style="border: 1pt solid; height: 30pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt; width: 0.75in;" width="72">  <p class="MsoNormal"><b><span style="background: lime;">Option 1<o:p></o:p></span></b></p>  </td>  <td style="border-bottom: 1pt solid; border-left: none; border-right: 1pt solid; border-top: none; height: 30pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt; width: 62pt;" width="83">  <p align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;">9:45am - 6:15pm PT<o:p></o:p></p>  </td>  <td style="border-bottom: 1pt solid; border-left: none; border-right: 1pt solid; border-top: none; height: 30pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt; width: 68pt;" width="91">  <p align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;">9:45am - 6:15pm PT<o:p></o:p></p>  </td>  <td style="border-bottom: 1pt solid; border-left: none; border-right: 1pt solid; border-top: none; height: 30pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt; width: 68pt;" width="91">  <p align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;">9:45am - 6:15pm PT<o:p></o:p></p>  </td>  <td style="border-bottom: 1pt solid; border-left: none; border-right: 1pt solid; border-top: none; height: 30pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt; width: 68pt;" width="91">  <p align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;">OFF<o:p></o:p></p>  </td>  <td style="border-bottom: 1pt solid; border-left: none; border-right: 1pt solid; border-top: none; height: 30pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt; width: 68pt;" width="91">  <p align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;">OFF<o:p></o:p></p>  </td>  <td style="border-bottom: 1pt solid; border-left: none; border-right: 1pt solid; border-top: none; height: 30pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt; width: 68pt;" width="91">  <p align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;">4:00pm - 12:30am PT<o:p></o:p></p>  </td>  <td style="border-bottom: 1pt solid; border-left: none; border-right: 1pt solid; border-top: none; height: 30pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt; width: 68pt;" width="91">  <p align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;">4:00pm - 12:30am PT<o:p></o:p></p>  </td>  </tr>  <tr style="height: 15pt;">  <td nowrap="" style="height: 15pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt; width: 0.75in;" valign="bottom" width="72">  </td>  <td nowrap="" style="height: 15pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt; width: 62pt;" width="83">  </td>  <td nowrap="" style="height: 15pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt; width: 68pt;" width="91">  </td>  <td nowrap="" style="height: 15pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt; width: 68pt;" width="91">  </td>  <td nowrap="" style="height: 15pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt; width: 68pt;" width="91">  </td>  <td nowrap="" style="height: 15pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt; width: 68pt;" width="91">  </td>  <td nowrap="" style="height: 15pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt; width: 68pt;" width="91">  </td>  <td nowrap="" style="height: 15pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt; width: 68pt;" width="91">  </td>  </tr>  <tr style="height: 15pt;">  <td style="height: 15pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt; width: 0.75in;" width="72"></td>  <td style="border: 1pt solid; height: 15pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt; width: 62pt;" width="83">  <p align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;"><b>Sunday<o:p></o:p></b></p>  </td>  <td style="border: 1pt solid; height: 15pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt; width: 68pt;" width="91">  <p align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;"><b>Monday<o:p></o:p></b></p>  </td>  <td style="border: 1pt solid; height: 15pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt; width: 68pt;" width="91">  <p align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;"><b>Tuesday<o:p></o:p></b></p>  </td>  <td style="border: 1pt solid; height: 15pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt; width: 68pt;" width="91">  <p align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;"><b>Wednesday<o:p></o:p></b></p>  </td>  <td style="border: 1pt solid; height: 15pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt; width: 68pt;" width="91">  <p align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;"><b>Thursday<o:p></o:p></b></p>  </td>  <td style="border: 1pt solid; height: 15pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt; width: 68pt;" width="91">  <p align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;"><b>Friday<o:p></o:p></b></p>  </td>  <td style="border: 1pt solid; height: 15pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt; width: 68pt;" width="91">  <p align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;"><b>Saturday<o:p></o:p></b></p>  </td>  </tr>  <tr style="height: 30pt;">  <td style="border: 1pt solid; height: 30pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt; width: 0.75in;" width="72">  <p class="MsoNormal"><b>Option 2<o:p></o:p></b></p>  </td>  <td style="border-bottom: 1pt solid; border-left: none; border-right: 1pt solid; border-top: none; height: 30pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt; width: 62pt;" width="83">  <p align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;"><span style="background: yellow;">OFF</span><o:p></o:p></p>  </td>  <td style="border-bottom: 1pt solid; border-left: none; border-right: 1pt solid; border-top: none; height: 30pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt; width: 68pt;" width="91">  <p align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;">9:45am - 6:15pm PT<o:p></o:p></p>  </td>  <td style="border-bottom: 1pt solid; border-left: none; border-right: 1pt solid; border-top: none; height: 30pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt; width: 68pt;" width="91">  <p align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;">9:45am - 6:15pm PT<o:p></o:p></p>  </td>  <td style="border-bottom: 1pt solid; border-left: none; border-right: 1pt solid; border-top: none; height: 30pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt; width: 68pt;" width="91">  <p align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;">9:45am - 6:15pm PT<o:p></o:p></p>  </td>  <td style="border-bottom: 1pt solid; border-left: none; border-right: 1pt solid; border-top: none; height: 30pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt; width: 68pt;" width="91">  <p align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;">OFF<o:p></o:p></p>  </td>  <td style="border-bottom: 1pt solid; border-left: none; border-right: 1pt solid; border-top: none; height: 30pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt; width: 68pt;" width="91">  <p align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;">4:00pm - 12:30am PT<o:p></o:p></p>  </td>  <td style="border-bottom: 1pt solid; border-left: none; border-right: 1pt solid; border-top: none; height: 30pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt; width: 68pt;" width="91">  <p align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;">4:00pm - 12:30am PT<o:p></o:p></p>  </td>  </tr>  <tr style="height: 15pt;">  <td nowrap="" style="height: 15pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt; width: 0.75in;" valign="bottom" width="72">  </td>  <td nowrap="" style="height: 15pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt; width: 62pt;" width="83">  </td>  <td nowrap="" style="height: 15pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt; width: 68pt;" width="91">  </td>  <td nowrap="" style="height: 15pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt; width: 68pt;" width="91">  </td>  <td nowrap="" style="height: 15pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt; width: 68pt;" width="91">  </td>  <td nowrap="" style="height: 15pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt; width: 68pt;" width="91">  </td>  <td nowrap="" style="height: 15pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt; width: 68pt;" width="91">  </td>  <td nowrap="" style="height: 15pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt; width: 68pt;" width="91">  </td>  </tr>  <tr style="height: 15pt;">  <td style="height: 15pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt; width: 0.75in;" width="72"></td>  <td style="border: 1pt solid; height: 15pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt; width: 62pt;" width="83">  <p align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;"><b><span style="background: yellow;">Sunday<o:p></o:p></span></b></p>  </td>  <td style="border: 1pt solid; height: 15pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt; width: 68pt;" width="91">  <p align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;"><b><span style="background: yellow;">Monday<o:p></o:p></span></b></p>  </td>  <td style="border: 1pt solid; height: 15pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt; width: 68pt;" width="91">  <p align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;"><b><span style="background: yellow;">Tuesday<o:p></o:p></span></b></p>  </td>  <td style="border: 1pt solid; height: 15pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt; width: 68pt;" width="91">  <p align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;"><b><span style="background: yellow;">Wednesday<o:p></o:p></span></b></p>  </td>  <td style="border: 1pt solid; height: 15pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt; width: 68pt;" width="91">  <p align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;"><b><span style="background: yellow;">Thursday<o:p></o:p></span></b></p>  </td>  <td style="border: 1pt solid; height: 15pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt; width: 68pt;" width="91">  <p align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;"><b><span style="background: yellow;">Friday<o:p></o:p></span></b></p>  </td>  <td style="border: 1pt solid; height: 15pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt; width: 68pt;" width="91">  <p align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;"><b><span style="background: yellow;">Saturday<o:p></o:p></span></b></p>  </td>  </tr>  <tr style="height: 30pt;">  <td style="border: 1pt solid; height: 30pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt; width: 0.75in;" width="72">  <p class="MsoNormal"><b><span style="background: yellow;">Option 3<o:p></o:p></span></b></p>  </td>  <td style="border-bottom: 1pt solid; border-left: none; border-right: 1pt solid; border-top: none; height: 30pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt; width: 62pt;" width="83">  <p align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;"><span style="background: yellow;">OFF<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="border-bottom: 1pt solid; border-left: none; border-right: 1pt solid; border-top: none; height: 30pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt; width: 68pt;" width="91">  <p align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;"><span style="background: yellow;">9:45am - 6:15pm PT<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="border-bottom: 1pt solid; border-left: none; border-right: 1pt solid; border-top: none; height: 30pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt; width: 68pt;" width="91">  <p align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;"><span style="background: yellow;">9:45am - 6:15pm PT<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="border-bottom: 1pt solid; border-left: none; border-right: 1pt solid; border-top: none; height: 30pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt; width: 68pt;" width="91">  <p align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;"><span style="background: yellow;">OFF<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="border-bottom: 1pt solid; border-left: none; border-right: 1pt solid; border-top: none; height: 30pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt; width: 68pt;" width="91">  <p align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;"><span style="background: yellow;">9:45am - 6:15pm PT<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="border-bottom: 1pt solid; border-left: none; border-right: 1pt solid; border-top: none; height: 30pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt; width: 68pt;" width="91">  <p align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;"><span style="background: yellow;">4:00pm - 12:30am PT<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="border-bottom: 1pt solid; border-left: none; border-right: 1pt solid; border-top: none; height: 30pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt; width: 68pt;" width="91">  <p align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;"><span style="background: yellow;">4:00pm - 12:30am PT<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  </tr>  </tbody>  </table>  <p class="MsoNormal"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p></div>
